object_a.label: other
object_a.description: fireplace with white mantel on right wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: A built-in fireplace with a white painted wooden mantel and dark firebox surround set into the right wall. Mantel appears to have small decorative items; hearth area is low and formal in style.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Below and left of the mounted TV on the right wall and adjacent to a recliner and side table

object_b.label: table
object_b.description: small side table next to recliner and sofa
object_b.long_form_open_description: A wooden side table with a dark finish positioned between a recliner and the sofa on the right side of the seating area. Surface holds small items and possibly a lamp (lamp base not clearly visible).
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Between the right-side recliner and the fireplace, adjacent to the seating group
